title: Wildfire still burning in the mountain near Ladismith
description: LADISMITH NEWS - The wildfire that has been...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"LADISMITH NEWS - The wildfire that has been burning in the mountain area is still burning. There is currently no danger to any lives or property.","html":"LADISMITH NEWS - The wildfire that has been burning in the mountain area is still burning. There is currently no danger to any lives or property."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Teams on the fire line are currently performing mopping-up operations and will monitor the fire throughout the day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Later this morning, a reconnaissance flight with the spotter will be conducted.","html":"Later this morning, a reconnaissance flight with the spotter will be conducted."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Stakeholders at the fire include Garden Route District Municipality's Fire and Rescue Services, CapeNature, Kannaland Protection Services and Working on Fire.","html":"Stakeholders at the fire include Garden Route District Municipality's Fire and Rescue Services, CapeNature, Kannaland Protection Services and Working on Fire."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you spot a veld or wildfire, please report it immediately to the GRDM Emergency Call Centre at 044 805 5071 or via WhatsApp at 081 709 5193.","html":"If you spot a veld or wildfire, please report it immediately to the GRDM Emergency Call Centre at 044 805 5071 or via WhatsApp at 081 709 5193."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Wildfire still burning in the mountain near Ladismith
